prompt: A collage style of a mountain village with a river.
prompt_refined: Generate an image, inspired by image 1, depicting a detailed, hand-drawn map-like aerial view of a mountain village. The village, characterized by numerous small, brown-roofed houses, sprawls across the mid-ground, nestled amidst rugged mountains in the background. A prominent winding river, widening into a lake, flows through the foreground and lower portion of the village, with some floating structures visible on the water in the lower-left. The artwork should maintain the clean lines, muted earthy color palette, and framed illustrative style of image 1.
objects: Prominent winding river in the foreground and lower portion of the village
Lake widening from the river in the foreground and lower portion of the village
Floating structures on the water in the lower-left
